title: Perfected Strike
description: Deal 6 damage. Deals 2 additional damage for ALL your cards containing [gold]Strike[/gold].
upgraded_description: Deal 6 damage. Deals 3 additional damage for ALL your cards containing [gold]Strike[/gold].
notes: Total damage is calculated as base damage (6) plus 2 (or 3 when upgraded) multiplied by the number of Strike cards you own.
